LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO BE HEARD ON MAY 22, 2013 AT 9:30 AM TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 8, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar May-08-2013 Continued To May-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INC.'s APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is continued on the court's own motion to be heard on May 22, 2013 at 9:30 am to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 8, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
